ValidationRule.description: PR1064302-420 : When prior status is Plant Review, only Plant_Admin can transition to Plant Review Complete. Plant_Admin cannot transition to any other status from Plant Review.
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( NOT($Setup.GWB_Switch__c.Bypass_VRs__c), ISCHANGED(Status__c), ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE(Status__c), 'Plant Review'), OR( AND( ISPICKVAL(Status__c, 'Plant Review Complete'), NOT($Permission.Plant_Admin) ), AND( NOT(ISPICKVAL(Status__c, 'Plant Review Complete')), $Permission.Plant_Admin ) ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Invalid status transition: Only a Plant Admin can update status of a Target record from Plant Review to Plant Review Complete. Plant Admins cannot change Plant Review to any other status.
